data.title: RISCPoint announces Matt Drewyor as new CEO, boosting its cybersecurity and compliance services.
data.description: On August 7, 2025, in Cleveland, RISCPoint, a prominent cybersecurity and compliance advisory firm, revealed the selection of Matt Drewyor as its latest Chief Executive Officer. This appointment signifies a critical milestone for RISCPoint as it pushes forward with its growth strategy.

data.title: Milan Laser Hair Removal moves HQ to 18020 Burt St in Omaha to support national growth; largest provider in US.
data.description: The country's largest laser hair removal company, Milan Laser Hair Removal, is bolstering its corporate campus in support of ongoing nationwide expansion. Their corporate headquarters in Omaha, Nebraska were recently relocated on August 7, 2025. Milan Laser Hair Removal is renowned for being the top provider of laser hair removal services in the nation.

data.title: West Cary Group wins marketing contract with Virginia Community College System to boost educational outreach.
data.description: A well-known communications agency has been chosen to enhance the visibility of the biggest higher education network in the state. The firm, West Cary Group, based in Richmond, Virginia, specializes in marketing, advertising, and technology. This achievement was announced on August 7, 2025, through a PRNewswire release.

data.title: Dr. Green Services provides expert lawn watering tips for Chicago homeowners during dry summer. Phone: 800-465-2934 Website: www.drgreenservices.com.
data.description: A company in Chicago, Dr. Green Services, is emphasizing the importance of proper watering for a healthy lawn during the current warm and dry summer. They are reachable at 800-465-2934 and have a website at www.drgreenservices.com. As of August 7, 2025, the Chicago area is experiencing these conditions, prompting the company to offer advice to residents.

data.title: Connecticut Lodging Association plans special meeting on Aug. 19, 2025, to support state’s hospitality industry.
data.description: In Westbrook, Connecticut, on August 7, 2025, the Connecticut Lodging Association (CLA) is taking steps to bolster the state's hospitality sector in the face of persistent challenges. The CLA has scheduled a Special Meeting slated for Tuesday, August 19, 2025, running from 3:30 p.m. to 5:30 p.m. at Water's. This initiative aims to address the issues affecting the hospitality industry, showcasing the commitment to its improvement.

data.title: Trilliant Health partners with Duke Health for data-driven growth and community engagement, aiding in decision-making.
data.description: Trilliant Health and Duke Health have joined forces in a strategic partnership to enhance data-driven decision-making tailored specifically to the diverse communities served by Duke Health. By leveraging Trilliant's cutting-edge analytics platform, Duke Health aims to optimize its growth strategies, network configurations, and patient reach. This initiative is based on a mutual dedication to effectively strategize for the evolving landscape and meet the demands of the expanding patient base.

data.title: US Bakeware Market worth $889.4 million in 2024, expected to grow at 7.37% CAGR, reaching $1.68 billion by 2033.
data.description: A report on the United States Bakeware Market indicates that in 2024, the market was valued at US$ 889.4 million. It is projected to grow at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 7.37% from 2025 to 2033, with an estimated market value of US$ 1.68 billion by 2033. Factors driving this growth include the popularity of home baking, increased demand for non-stick and eco-friendly bakeware, as well as the influence of cooking shows and social media.

data.title: STRATA Skin Sciences aims to widen coverage with expanded CPT codes, tripling their addressable market to over 30M patients.
data.description: In a recent development, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 6.5%, marking a significant increase from the previous quarter. The total number of unemployed individuals now stands at 2.8 million, highlighting a worrying trend in the job market. In addition, the report also revealed that the inflation rate has spiked to 4.2%, impacting the cost of living for many households. These economic indicators point towards ongoing challenges facing the country's economy, with efforts needed to address the rising unemployment and inflation rates.

data.title: Nuwellis plans to discontinue international operations in order to boost U.S. revenue and focus.
data.description: A new report has revealed alarming statistics surrounding the global refugee crisis. According to the report, the number of refugees worldwide has reached an all-time high of over 26 million people. This number includes 4.2 million refugees who have fled their home countries due to conflict and persecution. The report also highlights that over half of all refugees are under the age of 18, emphasizing the vulnerability of this population. The data further shows that developing countries host the majority of refugees, with Turkey being the top hosting country, followed by Pakistan and Uganda. The report underscores the urgent need for international cooperation and support to address the growing challenges faced by refugees globally.

data.title: Wi-Charge appoints CMO and VP of People post Series C funding, emphasizing growth in commercializing long-range wireless power.
data.description: Wi-Charge, a top player in long-range wireless power technology, made significant moves in expanding its global commercialization efforts. On August 7, 2025, the company based in Tel Aviv, Israel, disclosed two crucial leadership appointments to support this growth. This development underscores the company's momentum and strategic focus as it pushes into new frontiers.

data.title: Armyworm outbreak in DFW area - Dr. Green Services warns homeowners as pests can ruin lawns in 48 hours.
data.description: In a recent announcement on August 7, 2025, Dr. Green Services from Dallas and Fort Worth, Texas, has raised a pressing concern regarding armyworm infestation in the DFW region. Homeowners across North Texas are being cautioned about the presence of these destructive lawn pests. Capable of devouring healthy grass rapidly, the armyworms pose a serious threat as they can decimate an entire lawn within just 48 hours. It is imperative for residents to be proactive in protecting their lawns from these voracious pests to prevent extensive damage.

data.title: Tether Ventures invests in Bit2Me with a minority stake and leads €30 million round funding.
data.description: Tether Ventures, the investment branch of Tether, the leading company in the digital asset sector and creator of the widely-used stablecoin USDT, has purchased a partial ownership in Bit2Me. Tether Ventures is spearheading a €30 million funding round for Bit2Me, marking a significant development in the industry. Bit2Me has now emerged as the initial...

data.title: WiMi Hologram Cloud Inc. is developing new quantum algorithms for large-scale machine learning models.
data.description: On August 7, 2025, WiMi Hologram Cloud Inc. (NASDAQ: WiMi), a prominent global provider of Hologram Augmented Reality ("AR") Technology, revealed plans to investigate a novel quantum machine learning algorithm. This new algorithm aims to enhance their technological advancements.

data.title: American Camp Association backs Texas in improving camp safety post tragic floods. ACA working with state leaders on new standards after deaths.
data.description: In Martinsville, Indiana, on August 7, 2025, following the devastating floods in July in Texas that resulted in the unfortunate loss of campers and counselors, the American Camp Association (ACA) is working alongside state officials and camp professionals. They are joining forces to address the situation and enhance their coordination efforts in managing the aftermath.

data.title: DeFi perp DEX saw record $487B volumes in July, with Hyperliquid leading at $319B in trades, boosting DeFi market.
data.description: Last month, Hyperliquid facilitated trades amounting to $319 billion, representing a significant portion of the DeFi perpetual futures market. These transactions played a crucial role as decentralized exchanges become increasingly popular among investors.
